title: Lava Alert
description: Alerts you if there is lava beneath you.
body:
# ⚠️ Lava Alert

**Lava Alert** is a simple Minecraft datapack that detects lava under players and alerts them with a message and sound effect to prevent accidental falls.

![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QWtBbhMh/images/d738b59d3a6cb179227f52182b8a8be11e1e3bb7.gif)
## ✨ Features

- Provides both visual and sound alerts when there's lava beneath a player.
- Each player can individually enable or disable the warning system.
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.

## 🛠️ Toggle Alerts

You can easily enable or disable **your own** lava alerts at any time using the following commands:

- ✅ **Enable alerts:**  
  `/function alert:enable`

- ❌ **Disable alerts:**  
  `/function alert:disable`

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.13+
- No external resource packs needed
